name: Capo
activities: orchestrates delegate lifecycle
manages charter data and manifest entries
queries delegated data UTxOs
coordinates transaction building across delegates
caches delegate instances
connects delegates with on-chain role-delegation links
manages settings via manifest currentSettings

name: StellarContract
unifyingPrinciple: Base class for anything with an on-chain policy script. One degenerate case: wallet-based authority delegate extends it but enforces authority via UUT spending from wallet, not script validation.
activities: provides base class for all contract instances
manages script bundle lifecycle
provides compiled script access
computes validator hashes
exposes data bridge access
creates transaction contexts

name: StellarTxnContext
activities: accumulates typed transaction state
tracks inputs outputs and reference inputs
queues additional transactions for multi-tx workflows
manages validity periods and time constraints
coordinates with TxChainBuilder for virtual UTxO sets

name: Delegate System
chainOfCustody: Two parallel chains: (1) Minting chain: CapoMinter → mint delegate → data-policy delegate. (2) Spending chain: Capo main script → spend delegate → data-policy delegate. Mint and spend delegates are often the same script but triggered in different chains. Mint delegate never re-delegates to spend delegate — they are parallel, not sequential.
activities: defines delegate roles
creates and manages contract-backed delegate instances
implements CRUD on delegated data records
validates delegate authority via UUT spending (script-locked or wallet-held)
supports delegate upgrade lifecycle
manages IsDelegation datum linking UUTs to Capo
enforces chain-of-custody delegation

name: Data Bridge System
activities: converts on-chain UPLC data to TypeScript types
converts TypeScript types to on-chain UPLC data
provides pre-generated cast functions without compiled scripts
generates enum bridges for activity/redeemer types
supports CIP-68 Map-based datum parsing

name: Script Bundle System
languageAbstraction: HeliosScriptBundle is an intentional abstraction point for alternative scripting languages. Significant Helios coupling exists in bridge generator, rollup plugins, and @helios-lang/ledger types — aspirational pivot point with real grounding, not yet a clean seam.
activities: manages script compilation and UPLC caching (currently Helios-specific)
resolves script hashes via priority chain
provides configuredScriptDetails from precompiled bundles
implements cross-process compilation locking
tracks source hashes for cache invalidation

name: CapoMinter
activities: mints charter token and initial delegate UUTs during bootstrap
creates data-record UUTs for delegated data operations
burns tokens during delegate retirement and record deletion
defers day-to-day policy enforcement to mint/spend delegates

name: Testing Infrastructure
activities: simulates Cardano blockchain with UTxO tracking
manages hierarchical snapshot caching
provides deterministic wallet generation from PRNG seeds
orchestrates multi-layer test snapshots
manages namedRecords persistence across snapshots
supports hot-swap of network context via stable actorContext envelope

name: UtxoIndex
activities: monitors Capo address for new transactions
fetches and caches UTxOs with Blockfrost API
catalogs delegate UUTs at their script addresses
detects charter UTxO changes during routine monitoring
converts Helios types to storage-agnostic UtxoIndexEntry
implements ReadonlyCardanoClient for Helios integration

name: Network Clients
activities: manages transaction submission lifecycle
coordinates batch signing and submission
tracks submission status and confirmations
batches multiple transactions for single wallet prompt

name: UI Layer
activities: provides React context for dApp configuration
manages forms for creating/editing on-chain records
displays on-chain data from delegated data records
integrates wallet connection for transaction signing

name: Build Tooling
activities: compiles Helios .hl files during rollup build
generates data bridge classes from Helios type definitions
generates type info files for TypeScript integration
creates bundle class definitions with precompiled script details
manages Helios module dependency resolution
produces multiple platform-specific output bundles

name: On-chain Policy Layer
activities: enforces charter data integrity and lifecycle governance
validates delegate authority via UUT and IsDelegation datum
enforces minting policy for all token operations
validates delegated data operations via delegate scripts
supports MultipleDelegateActivities for batched operations
provides capoCtx helpers for datum reading and enforcement

name: Logging & Diagnostics
activities: provides structured logging via pino
supports custom log levels ops userError progress
enables facility-based level routing
provides Performance API marks for profiling
supports requirements tracing
provides test-specific logging

name: Charter data (including manifest)
description: Root datum at Capo address holding delegate links and manifest (token references to roles/data policies/settings). Central configuration for entire contract suite; manifest is accessed by delegates and minter for role discovery.

name: Delegate UUTs
description: Unique utility tokens proving delegate authority. Policy-approved by CapoMinter; runtime-owned by each delegate (stored at delegate script address). dgPol- prefix for delegates, idPrefix- for data records.

name: Delegated data records
description: CIP-68 structured datums stored at Capo address (runtime-owned by Capo). Enforcement delegated through chain of custody to data-policy delegates. Per-type with @id and tpe fields in Map payload.

name: Precompiled script details
description: Build-time computed script hashes and configs embedded in bundle classes; enables zero-compile startup

name: Generated type info and bridges
description: Build-time generated .bridge.ts, .typeInfo.d.ts, .hlb.ts files from Helios type definitions

name: Transaction state
description: Typed state accumulator (S extends anyState) encoding transaction preconditions in the type system

name: Snapshot chain
description: Hierarchical on-disk snapshots with hash-based invalidation for test performance

name: Indexed UTxOs
description: Persistent browser-side UTxO cache in IndexedDB via Dexie

name: Compilation cache
description: Cross-process safe Helios compilation cache with FS/IndexedDB backends and proper-lockfile

name: Diagnostic log output
description: Structured JSON logs and performance measures; cross-cutting concern consumed by all components

name: UtxoIndex → Blockfrost API
payload: address queries, tx details; returns UTxO/block data validated via ArkType

name: UI Layer → DelegatedDataContract
payload: find UTxOs of a particular record type

name: Testing → Emulator
payload: snapshot load/save, block submission, wallet funding

steps.action: select seed UTxO determining Capo identity
mintingCharter mints charter token plus initial delegate UUTs
write CharterData to Capo address with delegate links and manifest
install mint/spend delegates with ref scripts
commitPendingChanges - burns old UUT, updates manifest, activates new delegate
optionally create ref script for new policy, retire old
discover .hl files and resolve module dependencies
compile Helios to UPLC and extract type definitions

name: Semantic Data Query
description: UI/app queries delegated data with semantic filters. Predicates pushed to data source for selectivity: remote server, local IndexedDB indexed lookup, or fallback in-memory filter. Data Bridge converts results to typed TS.

name: On-chain validation logic
description: Helios scripts compiled to UPLC enforcing all policy; activity/redeemer type definitions drive bridge generation

name: Hot-Swap Envelope Pattern
activities: provides stable shared reference objects for runtime contexts
enables contents replacement without updating holders
propagates context changes to all consumers via shared reference
description: Cross-cutting pattern: stable outer reference shared by many components; contents swapped without updating holders. Used for network context, actor context, and logger context. All held via StellarContract setup object.

name: Network context envelope
description: Hot-swap envelope for ReadonlyCardanoClient implementation. Swapped between emulator (test), CachedUtxoIndex (browser), or direct Blockfrost (fallback). Shared by Capo, all delegates, UtxoHelper.

name: Actor context envelope
description: Hot-swap envelope for current wallet/actor reference. Test: swap between actors. Production: wallet connect/disconnect. Documented in Emulator.ARCHITECTURE.md as ARCH-y70gqh4nwn.

name: Lazy Redeemer Pattern
description: Helios TxBuilder supports LazyRedeemerData<T> = (tx?: TxInfo) => T | Promise<T> — deferred redeemer construction that fires at transaction finalization. Enables retroactive index hints (O(1) on-chain lookups by encoding exact input/output positions), closure-based context capture (call-site context + finalized TxInfo), and deferred activity construction. The closure should capture contextual information along with transaction-specific data to produce the final UPLC redeemer. Not yet used by the framework. See StellarTxnContext.architecture.md § Lazy Redeemer Pattern.

name: Hook context enrichment
description: DelegatedDataContract beforeCreate/beforeUpdate hooks receive tcx (mutable transaction context) plus Helios-aware deep-cloned, frozen record inputs. Enables hooks to coordinate record fields with transaction properties (e.g., updatedAt from tcx.txnEndTime). Utilities deepCloneRecord and deepFreezeRecord in src/util/ use duck-typing heuristic for Helios type awareness. See offchainRuntime.ARCHITECTURE.md § DelegatedDataContract Lifecycle Hooks.

name: Typed activity identity in hooks
description: Backlog: createContext and updateContext should include type-safe activity variant name (keyof MintingActivity/SpendingActivity from generated type bridge) and pre-serialization args. Requires utility types for union key extraction and discriminated arg lookup, plus threading concrete activity types through DelegatedDataContract's generic hierarchy. Common case has no args (seeded minting). Complements lazy redeemer pattern — hooks get semantic identity while UPLC construction may be deferred. See offchainRuntime.ARCHITECTURE.md § Typed Activity Identity in Hook Contexts.
